title: Jupyter Notebook Collaboration
description: Real-time collaborative editing settings for Jupyter Notebook v7

enabled.title: Enable Collaboration
enabled.description: Enable real-time collaborative editing for notebooks. When enabled, multiple users can edit the same notebook simultaneously with sub-100ms synchronization latency.

awareness.title: User Presence and Awareness
awareness.description: Settings for displaying collaborative user presence indicators

showPresenceAvatars.title: Show User Avatars
showPresenceAvatars.description: Display avatar icons for active collaborative users with unique colors and identifiers

showRemoteCursors.title: Show Remote Cursors
showRemoteCursors.description: Display real-time cursor positions and text selections from other users

showActiveCellHighlight.title: Show Active Cell Highlighting
showActiveCellHighlight.description: Highlight cells that are currently being edited by other users

presenceUpdateLatency.title: Presence Update Latency (ms)
presenceUpdateLatency.description: Maximum latency for updating presence indicators when user state changes

avatarDisplayLimit.title: Avatar Display Limit
avatarDisplayLimit.description: Maximum number of user avatars to display simultaneously

locking.title: Cell-level Locking Mechanism
locking.description: Settings for cell-level locking to prevent editing conflicts

enabled.title: Enable Cell Locking
enabled.description: Prevent concurrent edits to cells when locked by another user

showLockIndicators.title: Show Lock Indicators
showLockIndicators.description: Display visual lock indicators showing which user is currently editing each cell

lockTimeout.title: Lock Timeout (minutes)
lockTimeout.description: Automatically release cell locks after this period of inactivity

lockAcquisitionLatency.title: Lock Acquisition Latency (ms)
lockAcquisitionLatency.description: Maximum time to acquire a cell lock

respectLocksForExecution.title: Respect Locks for Execution
respectLocksForExecution.description: Prevent execution of cells that are locked by other users

connection.title: Collaboration Connection Settings
connection.description: WebSocket and server connection configuration for real-time collaboration

serverUrl.title: Collaboration Server URL
serverUrl.description: URL of the collaboration server endpoint for Yjs document synchronization. Leave empty to use default server.

reconnectionAttempts.title: Reconnection Attempts
reconnectionAttempts.description: Number of automatic reconnection attempts when WebSocket connection is lost

heartbeatInterval.title: Heartbeat Interval (ms)
heartbeatInterval.description: Interval for sending heartbeat messages to maintain connection

syncLatencyThreshold.title: Sync Latency Threshold (ms)
syncLatencyThreshold.description: Warning threshold for document synchronization latency

permissions.title: Permissions and Access Control
permissions.description: Role-based access control settings for collaborative notebooks

enforceServerSideValidation.title: Enforce Server-side Validation
enforceServerSideValidation.description: Validate user permissions server-side for all collaboration operations

adaptUIBasedOnRole.title: Adapt UI Based on Role
adaptUIBasedOnRole.description: Hide or disable UI elements based on user access level (view-only, editor, admin)

realTimePermissionUpdates.title: Real-time Permission Updates
realTimePermissionUpdates.description: Apply permission changes immediately without requiring session restart

comments.title: Comment and Review System
comments.description: Settings for collaborative commenting and review features

enabled.title: Enable Comments
enabled.description: Enable threaded commenting on notebook cells

realTimeSync.title: Real-time Comment Sync
realTimeSync.description: Synchronize comments in real-time across all collaborative users

notificationsEnabled.title: Comment Notifications
notificationsEnabled.description: Show notifications for new comments, replies, and resolutions

maxCommentsPerCell.title: Max Comments per Cell
maxCommentsPerCell.description: Maximum number of comment threads allowed per cell

autoResolveTimeout.title: Auto-resolve Timeout (days)
autoResolveTimeout.description: Automatically resolve comment threads after this period of inactivity (0 to disable)

history.title: Collaboration Change History
history.description: Settings for tracking and managing collaborative change history

enabled.title: Enable Change History
enabled.description: Record comprehensive per-user change log with attribution

retentionPeriod.title: History Retention Period (days)
retentionPeriod.description: Number of days to retain change history data

enableVersionComparison.title: Enable Version Comparison
enableVersionComparison.description: Allow users to browse and compare different document versions

maxHistoryEntries.title: Max History Entries
maxHistoryEntries.description: Maximum number of change history entries to maintain

performance.title: Performance Settings
performance.description: Performance optimization settings for collaborative editing

maxConcurrentUsers.title: Max Concurrent Users
maxConcurrentUsers.description: Maximum number of users allowed in a collaborative session

memoryOverheadLimit.title: Memory Overhead Limit (%)
memoryOverheadLimit.description: Maximum memory overhead allowed for collaboration features as percentage of base usage

enableLowBandwidthMode.title: Enable Low Bandwidth Mode
enableLowBandwidthMode.description: Optimize for low-bandwidth connections by reducing update frequency

batchUpdateInterval.title: Batch Update Interval (ms)
batchUpdateInterval.description: Interval for batching Yjs updates to optimize bandwidth usage

gracefulDegradation.title: Graceful Degradation
gracefulDegradation.description: Settings for fallback behavior when collaboration services are unavailable

enableOfflineMode.title: Enable Offline Mode
enableOfflineMode.description: Continue notebook functionality when collaboration server is unavailable

showConnectionStatus.title: Show Connection Status
showConnectionStatus.description: Display collaboration server connection status in the UI

autoRetryConnection.title: Auto-retry Connection
autoRetryConnection.description: Automatically attempt to reconnect to collaboration server when connection is lost

offlineModeWarning.title: Show Offline Mode Warning
offlineModeWarning.description: Display warning message when operating in offline mode
